## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

- Node version: [e.g., 18.x]
- Dashboard version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Screenshots, logs, or other relevant information.
